headline: Assessing KKR (NYSE:KKR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Recent share performance and what it might signal KKR (KKR) shares have seen mixed returns recently, with a 1 day gain of 1.9% and a 7 day rise of 4.0%, set against a month decline of 10.9% and a past 3 months decline of 31.3%. See our latest analysis for KKR. Even after the recent bounce, KKR’s share price return over the past year remains negative while the 3 year and 5 year total shareholder returns are strongly positive. This suggests long term holders have still seen substantial gains...
